# Checklist

- [ ] Champion approved the proposal issue (link: )
- [ ] Frontmatter has `last-verified` date and owner
- [ ] Guideline files under 150 lines; skills' SKILL.md under 500 lines
- [ ] No client names, client code, or client data
- [ ] Skills: `name` matches folder name, tested with Claude Code
- [ ] External links annotated (what, why, time)
